'''chathasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachniphobia|arachniphobia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachniphobia|arachniphobia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chathasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || chæthæsæth || chæthæsæj || chæthæsæsh || chæthæsæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || chathathasath || chathathasaj || chathathasash || chathathasa
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || chathasath || chathasaj || chathasash || chathasa
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || chathafsafth || chathafsafj || chathafsafsh || chathafsaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || chathasatha || chathasaja || chathasasha || chathasaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || chathasath || chathasaj || chathasash || chathasa
|-
| [[Possessive]] || chathasathal || chathasajal || chathasashal || chathasakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || chathasaathatha || chathasaajaja || chathasaashasha || chathasaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || chathasathan || chathasajan || chathasashan || chathasakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || chathasathaoro || chathasajaoro || chathasashaoro || chathasakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
